sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88801" key="prosblu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσβλύζω</orth>, <sense id="n88801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lap against</tr_>, of water, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ποταμοῦ ὄχθη χλοερῷ λειμῶνι -βλύζουσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.320c</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (s. v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
